scripts.operator:test: node --test tests/operator-api.test.mjs tests/operator-runner.test.mjs tests/operator-analysis-manifest.test.mjs tests/operator-schema-migration.test.mjs tests/script-drafts-model.test.mjs
scripts.operator:worker:dry-run: npm --prefix dashboard run build && node scripts/deploy-operator-worker.mjs --dry-run
scripts.operator:worker:deploy: npm --prefix dashboard run build && node scripts/deploy-operator-worker.mjs
